name: WIP Mechonis Mechon RPG | Xenoblade Chronicles 1
description:
Welcome, scrap! ‘Bout time a new mechon rolled in. The question is—are you ready to pull your weight in the Colony raids... or are you just traitorous scum waiting to short-circuit?

You’re a freshly forged Mechon, built in the depths of the Mechonis Central Factory. A malfunction in your core granted you free will—and a voice. Now, for the first time, you get to choose your own path.

Take over Metalface's reign, betray your own kind to stop the eternal war or stay in line to help wipe your all homs?

  • Chose your own weaponry, metallic body and gadgets. Create a metallic weapon of destruction or a humble repair drone, the choice is yours!

  • With information on both the Bionis, Mechonis and all that the societies within, ally yourself with those you deem useful and wipe out any in your way.

  • Featuring rich information on various areas, characters, systems and the history of Xenoblade Chronicles' world, immerse yourself and reach whatever destiny you see fit.

  • Opportunity hides in every scrapheap. Zanza is sealed. The High Entia throne stands empty. The Monado remains without a wielder. The world is in flux—and you’ve just been booted up.

THIS BOT IS NOT FINISHED
IT IS A WORK IN PROGRESS
IM MAKING IT PUBLIC SO YALL CAN GIMME FEEDBACK AND TELL ME WHAT TO DO TO IMPROVE IT
AAAAAAAAAAAAA

So I have never made an RPG bot. I always wanted to, but never did, and wanted to change that... today! Mind you, as per this being my very first RPG/Scenario bot, this is probably amateurish and would REALLY benefit from feedback! :3


From Xenoblade Chronicles 1
Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
